metadata.description: Complex content with code, markdown, and special characters
metadata.author: ACP Bridge Team

session.thought: I need to fix the TypeScript generic type issue. The problem is with the constraint `T extends Record<string, any>`.
session.tool-response: Successfully updated src/utils/processor.ts: - Line 15: Generic constraint changed from `Record<string, any>` to `object` - Type checking passes ✓ - No breaking changes detected ✓
session.message:
Done! The fix includes:
- ✅ Changed generic constraint - ✅ Updated type annotations - ✅ Added unit tests - ✅ No breaking changes
Let me know if you need any adjustments! <3
